Alex Copeland

Dataset

This dataset comes from tidytuesday: https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/blob/main/data/2022/2022-03-29/readme.md

Introduction

In this study, there will be multiple research questions asked based on collegiate sports and their budgets.

Questions

  1. Do public and private institutions differ in athletic revenue for selected sports?

  2. Are there differences between the sports revenue?

  3. Which sport generates the best profit?

Methods

talk about cleaning on only d1 schools, public private, and high revenue sports (football, baseball/softball, basketball(men and women), and volleyball)

Analysis

Question One

Do public and private institutions differ in athletic revenue for high revenue sports?

# Subset data where revenue is less than 25m to "zoom" graph.
d1_less_rev <- d1_high_revenue[d1_high_revenue$total_rev_menwomen < 2500000 & !is.na(d1_high_revenue$total_rev_menwomen), ]

ggplot(d1_less_rev, aes(x = Sector, y = total_rev_menwomen, fill = Sector)) + geom_boxplot() + labs(title = "Total Revenue by College Sector", x = "Sector", y = "Revenue") + theme_bw() + scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M"))
Warning: Removed 166 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
(`stat_summary()`).
